---
output: 
  html_document:
    css: custom_styles.css
---
#### Day 2 Goals

Goals for Day 2: 
<ol>
<li>Exposure to the main tidyverse packages and philosophy behind it.</li>
<li>Comfortable filtering and selecting data, renaming and creating new columns in `dplyr` </li>
<li>dealing with NAs/0s</li>
<li>Working with dates</li>
<li>Data visualization best practices</li>
<li>Introduction to ggplot2</li>
</ol>
